steps.title: Identify the strongest clue
steps.content: The strongest clue is “widely celebrated portraits” — Edwards has created acclaimed, accomplished work. This establishes that we need a verb describing what such accomplished work has earned him.

steps.title: Match the clue to the correct answer
steps.content:
The target meaning is “to gain” or “to attain” prestige — “achieved” directly fits because it means to accomplish or acquire something through effort, which expresses how Edwards has earned prestige through his acclaimed work. The other three either ask for something unrelated, form nonsensical phrases, or contradict the positive setup.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
